sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43513" key="eu)bo/struxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐβόστρῠχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of beautiful locks</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἴγλη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.250</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Iren.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
